description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a clean, minimalist design, featuring a combination of white and light wood exterior finishes. The roof is primarily gabled with intersecting sections, and the structure sits on a raised brick foundation. The front facade includes a recessed entryway with a wooden accent panel and a small overhang, as well as a mix of narrow and wide windows. The rear and side elevations display a more uniform arrangement of windows and a secondary door, while the garage is integrated into the main volume of the house. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric lines and functional simplicity.
description: A modern, single-story house with a gabled roof, white walls, wood accents, and a brick foundation. Features include a recessed entryway, integrated garage, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a wooden accent, overhang, and a garage door on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the intersecting gabled rooflines and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a uniform arrangement of windows and a secondary door, lacking decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing large windows and the angular roof intersection near the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a wooden accent panel, small overhang, and minimalistic door design
